docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $200.00 FILED BY SMITH, LE SHAUN AS TO DEFENDANT EVERGREEN BAPTIST CHURCH OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-10-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF SMITH, LE SHAUN
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT EVERGREEN BAPTIST CHURCH OF SAN FRANCISCO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-10-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SMITH, LE SHAUN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EVERGREEN BAPTIST CHURCH OF SAN FRANCISCO $150.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $220.00, DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT AGAINST THIS JUDGMENT FOR ITS PREVIOUS $100.00 PAYMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
